name: Creatine + Beta-Alanine
summary: Creatine plus beta-alanine is a performance-oriented combination: creatine supports repeated high-intensity ATP regeneration, while beta-alanine raises muscle carnosine for buffering during hard efforts.
description: Creatine plus beta-alanine is a performance-oriented combination: creatine supports repeated high-intensity ATP regeneration, while beta-alanine raises muscle carnosine for buffering during hard efforts.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.
